meta.title: The Drone Threat To ICS
meta.description:
Kevin Finisterre of Department 13 provides an entertaining session on drones and how they could be used to attack industrial control systems (ICS). It has a number of videos demonstrating capabilities.

Kevin also provides guidance on how to defend against the increasing drone threat.
